prompt_text: An elderly ancient Chinese midwife in plain layered hanfu, anxious lined face, hair pinned in a practical bun beneath a dark cloth wrap, weathered hands, urgent and pleading expression, lunging toward the center-left of the frame in a medium shot; behind her, A tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, cinematic lighting, lies half-covered by a white cloth on the bed; an ancient Chinese imperial physician in muted robes waits nearby with tense restraint. The midwife leans forward as if almost crossing the lens to demand an answer, mouth open in urgent appeal, all bodies oriented toward the same off-screen pressure point. The birthing room is layered with depth: bed canopy, old wooden interior, bedding folds, and a bronze basin at lower left throwing back a sharp warm reflection, while the right rear bed area remains partially obscured. Low-saturation teal-gray, dark wood brown, and amber candlelight dominate, with handheld instability, compressed space, side-backlight and practical candle glow creating escalating pressure. Cinematic historical drama realism, dense blocking, shallow-to-medium depth of field, high emotional tension, highly detailed textures.
